title: Checklists for InfoBoxes

posts.author: JustinVR_SCF (Justin van Ryneveld)
posts.cookedHtml:
The checklists feature in updates is a nice way of keeping track of small things we need to return to or revisit.
However, the information in updates gets lost over time as there are a lot of updates.
It would be useful to create a Checklist in the info boxes section so that we don’t have to dig for the information again.
Cheers,
Justin

posts.author: TheOtherPM (Paul McGregor)
posts.cookedHtml: Sometimes we pin the checklist update to the top. That helps

posts.author: JustinVR_SCF (Justin van Ryneveld)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you. This is a useful workaround for now.
